stemHtml: During a flight at FL210, a pilot does not receive any DME distance indication from a DME station located approximately 220 NM away.The reason for this is that the..

options.a: Aeroplane is below the minimum altitude for line of sight propagation.
options.b: Aeroplane is circling around the station.
options.c: The power of the transmitted signal is too weak to be received by the DME station.
